leadText: The Lava Cookie (Japanese: フエンせんべい Huen Rice Cracker) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation III. It is a local specialty of Lavaridge Town and cures a Pokémon from all non-volatile status conditions and confusion.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it cures a Pokémon of all non-volatile status conditions ( poison , paralysis , sleep , burn , freeze ) and confusion .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Colo XD A local specialty that heals all status problems. FR LG Lavaridge Town 's local specialty. It heals all the status problems of one Pok é mon . D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 Lavaridge Town's local specialty. It heals all the status problems of one Pokémon. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA Lavaridge Town's local specialty. It can be used once to heal all the status conditions of a Pokémon. S V Lavaridge Town’s local specialty. It can be used to cure any status condition a Pokémon may have.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Lava Cookies appear to be based upon senbei , a traditional Japanese rice cracker, specifically one wrapped with nori (seaweed).
